description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and large, geometric windows, set on a green lawn with a swimming pool and surrounded by mature trees. The house features a prominent glass atrium or sunroom on the upper floor, adding architectural interest and natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light gray material, and the windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some floor-to-ceiling panes. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool with a paved deck area, and the landscaping is lush with a mix of flowering and leafy trees. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and functionality. The overall design is contemporary, prioritizing open spaces, large windows, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, a glass atrium, and a backyard swimming pool, surrounded by lush trees and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, large windows, glass atrium, and the swimming pool to the left.
description_view_1: Side view mostly obscured by dense trees, with only a small portion of the house visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back wall, more windows, and the pool area on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing the pool directly in front of the house and the rooftop terrace or atrium.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and a glass atrium
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal decorative elements, no porch or steps, emphasizing clean lines
